nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “See, I make you as God to Pharaoh, and your brother Aaron shall be your prophet.

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “See, I have made you like God to Pharaoh, and your brother Aaron shall be your prophet.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“看哪，我使你在法老面前好像　神一樣；你哥哥亞倫要作你的先知。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“我要使你在法老面前像上帝一样，你哥哥亚伦是你的发言人。
